**Dr. Syeda Tasneem Towhid**
Associate Professor, Department of Microbiology
Jagannath University, Dhaka, Bangladesh
Email: towhidst@mib.jnu.ac.bd
*Relationship: M.Sc. Project Supervisor and long-term research collaborator (2019–present)*

**Dr. Md. Salequl Islam**
Professor, Department of Microbiology
Jahangirnagar University, Dhaka, Bangladesh
Email: salequl@juniv.edu
*Relationship: Collaborative researcher in antimicrobial resistance and microbiology studies*

*Additional references from international collaborators at the Institute for Health Metrics and Evaluation (IHME, University of Washington) and Michigan State University are available upon request.*
